prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近年持续前移趋势、2026年大幅扩招（+33.3%）使竞争压力有所分散、但本省物理类考生数同步大 幅增长（约+32.4%）抵消部分扩招红利，以及学校声誉平稳、专业热度对理科考生的持续吸引力，在，预测2026年最低位次约11468名 ，区间10968–11968名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 science/physics category minimum rankings approximately 12365→13780→12334→9609→9598, rankings moved back in 2021–2022, significantly moved forward in 2023–2025, cumulative forward movement of about 2800 places in the last 3 years; 2025 baseline approximately 9598 places; provincial science/physics category plan: 39 in 2021, 39 in 2022, 48 in 2023, 54 in 2024, 60 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend; 2026 plan 80, an increase of 20 (+33.3%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, significantly impacting the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science main ranking approximately 101st in 2026, fluctuating between 90–104 in recent years, overall stable; no A- or above disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, advantageous disciplines mainly B+ (e.g., Computer Science and Technology, Electronic Science and Technology), overall discipline strength at the mid-level among 211 universities; rated as somewhat negative due to teacher ethics incident during the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, but it has been some time; Douyin popularity ranking 84th (average), short video exposure moderate; no obvious enrollment gaps recorded.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering are highly popular and recommended, strongly attractive to science students; total number of regular college entrance examination students in the province in 2026 approximately 377,900, significantly increased from about 285,700 in 2025, estimated physics category examinees about 229,400 based on recent proportions, an increase of about 32.4% from 173,300 in 2025, intensifying competition; Anhui University is located in Hefei City, Anhui Province, not a local university, no local enrollment preference; the university's enrollment proportion in Yunnan Province is about 1.5%–2%, a medium scale for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings in recent years, the significant expansion in 2026 (+33.3%) disperses competitive pressure, but the simultaneous substantial increase in provincial physics category examinees (about +32.4%) offsets some of the expansion benefits, along with stable school reputation and sustained attractiveness of popular majors to science students, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking is approximately 11468, with a range of 10968–11968.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 7715 → 3091 → 2546 → 3396 → 3856. The ranking was relatively low in 2021, moved significantly forward in 2022–2023, and slightly backward in 2024–2025; cumulative backward movement over the past 2 years is about 460 places; the 2025 baseline is approximately 3856 places. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 20 in 2021, 20 in 2022, 24 in 2023, 29 in 2024, and 34 in 2025, showing continuous expansion; the 2026 plan is 44, an increase of 10 (+29.4%) compared to 2025, indicating a relatively large expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 101st in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in recent years; during the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, it was rated as somewhat negative due to a teacher ethics incident, but this has passed; Douyin popularity ranking is 84th (average), with moderate short video exposure; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are no A- or above disciplines, with liberal arts-related disciplines mainly at the B level (e.g., Law B+, Chinese Language and Literature B+), indicating overall academic strength is mid-tier among 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.text: Law has polarized social heat with a wait-and-see attitude, accounting/finance is recommended, teacher training/education is polarized with a wait-and-see attitude, and the overall heat of popular liberal arts majors is stable; the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in the province in 2026 is approximately 377,900, with an estimated 148,500 history category candidates based on recent proportions, an increase of about 32.1% compared to 112,400 in 2025, intensifying competition; Anhui University is located in Hefei, Anhui Province, not a local university; its enrollment proportion in Yunnan Province for liberal arts is about 1%–2%, indicating a medium scale of cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the recent slight backward trend in historical rankings, the significant expansion in 2026 (+29.4%) which somewhat disperses competitive pressure, but the simultaneous substantial increase in the number of history category candidates in the province (about +32.1%) which further intensifies competition, along with stable university reputation and polarized heat of liberal arts majors, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 4566, with a range of 4066–5066.
